title: Brazilian Flaky Crumbly Oats Bread
description: Tender crumb and crispy crust combine in this sweet and savory Brazilian oats bread, perfect for breakfast or a snack.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together oats, flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add brown sugar and softened butter to the dry ingredients and mix until crumbly.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and set aside.
Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough onto a lightly floured slate tile or baking sheet, forming a rectangle.
Bake for 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
